data.description: Your luck keeps you alive. When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll, but you can't use this trait to change a natural 20.
You can speak, read, and write Common and Halfling.

As stout a halfling. you're hardier than average and have some to resistance poison. Some say that stouts have dwarven blood. In Forgotten Realms, these halflings are called stronghearts and they're common in south.
You have advantage on saving throws against being knocked prone and advantage on优势检查
